message:
feat(tui): add S5 Ballast model/update and fix adapter InvalidData handling

- Add BallastVolume struct, cursor/detail methods, and S5 screen state
- Wire TelemetryBallast message handler in update (cursor clamping on refresh)
- Fix DashboardStateAdapter: InvalidData → Malformed (not ReadError)
- Fix timeline_follow not cleared on cursor_down
- 12 ballast model tests, 1 status_level test

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
